Event: Paper Hustle
Event Date: 18/05/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: T224
Paper Hustle Totem

Once in a while, 2 random positive effects are removed from all enemy units, and the targets are afflicted with exhaustion. The targets receive physical damage equal to 200% of the unit's attack every second. While the enemy units are exhausted, their damage and attack speed are reduced by 35%. The exhaustion lasts for 4 sec. Stacks up to 4 times.

- Level 20
Once in a while, 3 random positive effects are remaved from all enemy units, and the targets are afflicted with exhaustion. The targets receive physical damage equal to 225% of the unit's attack every second. While the enemy units are exhausted, their damage and attack speed are reduced by 40%. The exhaustion lasts for 4 sec. Stacks up to 4 times.

- Level 40
Once in a while, 4 random positive effects are removed from all enemy units, and the torgets are afflicted with exhaustion. The targets receive physical damage equal to 250% of the unit's attack every second. While the enemy units are exhausted, their damage and attack speed are reduced by 45%. The exhaustion lasts for 4 sec. Stacks up to 4 times.

Requirements: 90

First trigger: 4 sec
